{{R|Bone Flute||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|color:Necrobinder|Necrobinder-exclusive|2}} {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. <!-- {{{MORE INFORMATION}}} -->

== Spawn Restrictions==
Can only be obtained by {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}.

== Interactions ==

=== Synergies ===
* {{C|Rattle||2}} will trigger '''Bone Flute''' multiple times for each other time {{KW|Osty||2}} has attacked this turn.

== Notes ==
* See [[StS2:Osty#Osty_Attacks|Osty > Osty Attacks]] for all ways to trigger '''Bone Flute'''.

== Update History ==

* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Bone Flute to the game.
